parameters.content:
## SEO — Content Ideas Generator
Runs at 10:00 AM Israel time (08:00 UTC)

Fetches top 10 new opportunities, calls Claude API for each to generate 2-3 article ideas.

**Requires:**
- Anthropic API key in n8n credentials (type: httpHeaderAuth)
  Name: 'Anthropic API'
  Header: Authorization: Bearer sk-ant-...

parameters.query:
SELECT id, opportunity_type, page_url, query, avg_position, impressions, priority_score
FROM seo_opportunities
WHERE status = 'new'
  AND detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY priority_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

=SELECT query, ROUND(AVG(avg_position)::numeric, 1) AS position, SUM(impressions) AS impressions
FROM seo_queries_daily
WHERE page_url = '{{ $json.page_url }}'
  AND date >= CURRENT_DATE - 28
GROUP BY query
ORDER BY impressions DESC
LIMIT 10;

=INSERT INTO seo_content_ideas
  (opportunity_id, source_page_url, target_query, suggested_article_title, search_intent, suggested_angle, why_it_matters, internal_links, status, created_at)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.opportunity_id }},
  '{{ $json.source_page_url }}',
  '{{ $json.target_query.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.suggested_article_title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.search_intent }}',
  '{{ $json.suggested_angle.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.why_it_matters.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.internal_links }}'::jsonb,
  'pending',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
